papers.title_en: A Regularized Backbone-Level Cross-Modal Interaction Framework for Stable Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对第一人称视角视频理解中观测稀疏、噪声多及时间模糊等挑战，提出了一个正则化的骨干级跨模态交互框架。该框架从理论层面探讨了视频语言模型（VLM）的稳定性，通过在骨干网络层引入正则化机制来优化跨模态特征融合，旨在实现更稳健的时间推理。主要贡献在于解决了第一人称影像中的不确定性问题，显著提升了模型在复杂动态场景下的表现与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning approaches for egocentric video understanding often lack a principledtheoretical treatment of stability, particularly when dealing with the sparse, noisy, andtemporally ambiguous observations characteristic of first-person imaging. In this …

papers.title_en: Interpretable chronic obstructive pulmonary disease identification using chest X-ray radiomics: a multicenter study
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并验证一种结合胸部X射线（CXR）影像组学特征与临床特征的综合模型，用于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）的识别。通过多中心研究，该模型不仅提升了诊断的准确性，还通过增强模型的可解释性，为临床医生提供了一种高效、无创且易于理解的辅助诊断工具，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives To construct and validate a combined model integrating chest X-ray(CXR)-based radiomic features and clinical characteristics for chronic obstructivepulmonary disease (COPD) identification, while enhancing model interpretability …

papers.title_en: SRS279-Using nnU-Net to segment MRI images of the foot in patients with diabetic foot disease
papers.tldr: 糖尿病足病（DFD）是导致下肢截肢的复杂疾病，MRI是其临床诊断的重要工具。本研究利用nnU-Net深度学习框架对糖尿病足患者的足部MRI图像进行自动分割，旨在通过自动化提取MRI中的替代标志物，实现病变的早期检测与风险预测。该方法为临床提供了高效的图像分析手段，有助于优化治疗方案并降低截肢率。
papers.abstract_en: Introduction Diabetic foot disease (DFD) is a complex disease and is associated withlower limb amputation. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is commonly used inpatients with DFD. Early detection of surrogate markers on MRI may help to predict …

papers.title_en: ProFound: A moderate-sized vision foundation model for multi-task prostate imaging
papers.tldr: 本研究针对前列腺癌多参数MRI诊断中专家解读难以规模化的问题，提出了ProFound，一个中等规模的视觉基础模型。该模型旨在通过多任务学习处理前列腺影像中的多种临床任务，克服了传统自动化方法对专家经验的高度依赖，为前列腺癌的自动化诊断和治疗提供了高效且可扩展的视觉表征方案。
papers.abstract_en: Many diagnostic and therapeutic clinical tasks for prostate cancer increasingly relyon multi-parametric MRI. Automating these tasks is challenging because theynecessitate expert interpretations, which are difficult to scale to capitalise on modern …

papers.title_en: CAMD: Coverage-Aware Multimodal Decoding for Efficient Reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）中存在的计算资源与任务难度不匹配问题，本文提出了覆盖感知多模态解码（CAMD）框架。该方法通过感知视觉内容的覆盖程度来动态优化解码过程，旨在减少冗余计算并提升推理效率。实验证明，CAMD 在多种视觉语言任务中实现了性能与效率的平衡，为高效多模态推理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shownimpressive reasoning capabilities across vision-language tasks, yet still face thechallenge of compute-difficulty mismatch. Through empirical analyses, we identify …

papers.title_en: Self-supervised Disentanglement of Disease Effects from Aging in 3D Medical Shapes
papers.tldr: 本研究针对3D医学形状分析中病理变化与生理衰老难以区分的问题，提出了一种自监督解耦框架。在缺乏诊断标签的情况下，该方法能够有效分离疾病效应与年龄因素，为开发可解释的生物标志物和患者分层提供了新工具。主要贡献在于实现了无监督下的特征解耦，提升了医学影像分析的临床实用性。
papers.abstract_en: Disentangling pathological changes from physiological aging in 3D medical shapesis crucial for developing interpretable biomarkers and patient stratification. However,this separation is challenging when diagnosis labels are limited or unavailable, since …

papers.title_en: Pixel-level Counterfactual Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗图像分割中人工标注成本高及AI生成标签（银标准）存在偏差的问题，提出了一种像素级反事实对比学习框架。该方法通过自监督学习机制，在无需大量高质量标注的情况下，利用反事实推理增强特征表示的鲁棒性，有效提升了分割精度并缓解了伪标签带来的偏差，为低资源医疗影像分析提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Image segmentation relies on large annotated datasets, which are expensive andslow to produce. Silver-standard (AI-generated) labels are easier to obtain, but theyrisk introducing bias. Self-supervised learning, needing only images, has become …

papers.title_en: REAL: Regression-Aware Reinforcement Learning for LLM-as-a-Judge
papers.tldr: 本文针对 LLM-as-a-Judge 范式中传统强化学习（RL）仅依赖二元反馈的局限性，提出了 REAL（回归感知强化学习）框架。该方法通过将回归任务引入 RL 流程，使模型能够更有效地学习和预测连续的数值评分。研究证明，REAL 显著提升了 LLM 作为自动评分器的准确性与一致性，为复杂评估任务提供了更精细的优化手段。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as automated evaluatorsthat assign numeric scores to model outputs, a paradigm known as LLM-as-a-Judge.However, standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods typically rely on binary …

papers.title_en: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型后训练阶段（结合监督微调与强化学习）配置困难的问题，本文提出了一种自动配置框架。由于后训练过程涉及高维异构的配置空间且各阶段耦合严重，在有限计算预算下手动调优极具挑战。该研究通过自动化手段优化流水线配置，显著提升了模型性能并降低了资源消耗，为高效构建高质量LLM提供了系统化方案。
papers.abstract_en: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcementlearning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configurationspace is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and …

papers.title_en: Evaluating Counterfactual Strategic Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究通过重复博弈实验评估了大语言模型（LLM）的策略推理能力，重点探讨其表现是源于真实的逻辑推理还是对训练模式的记忆。研究者以囚徒困境等经典博弈为基础，通过引入反事实场景来测试模型的适应性，揭示了当前模型在处理非标准策略问题时的局限性，为理解LLM的决策机制提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: We evaluate Large Language Models (LLMs) in repeated game-theoretic settings toassess whether strategic performance reflects genuine reasoning or reliance onmemorized patterns. We consider two canonical games, Prisoner's Dilemma (PD) …

papers.title_en: Gastric-X: A Multimodal Multi-Phase Benchmark Dataset for Advancing Vision-Language Models in Gastric Cancer Analysis
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型在医疗诊断领域因缺乏结构化多模态数据而受限的问题，推出了Gastric-X数据集。这是一个专门用于胃癌分析的多模态、多阶段基准数据集，旨在通过提供高质量的标注数据，推动模型在复杂医疗场景下的推理与诊断能力，为胃癌的精准医疗研究提供了重要的基准支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong generalization andmultimodal reasoning abilities in natural domains. However, their application tomedical diagnosis remains limited by the lack of comprehensive and structured …

papers.title_en: A Clinically Anchored Radiomics Dictionary for Explainable TI-RADS-Based Thyroid Nodule Classification in Ultrasound; Dictionary Version TU1. 0
papers.tldr: 本研究针对甲状腺超声AI模型缺乏可解释性的问题，开发并验证了一个基于临床TI-RADS标准的影像组学特征字典（TU1.0）。该方法通过将复杂的影像组学特征与临床医生熟悉的TI-RADS分类标准挂钩，构建了一个既具有高性能又具备可解释性的分类模型，旨在增强临床信任并促进AI在甲状腺结节诊断中的实际应用。
papers.abstract_en: Artificial intelligence based radiomics models for thyroid ultrasound (US) oftenachieve strong diagnostic performance but remain difficult to interpret, limiting clinicaltrust and adoption. We developed and validated an interpretable radiomic feature …

papers.title_en: Ran Score: a LLM-based Evaluation Score for Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对胸部X射线报告自动评估中难以识别罕见异常及处理否定、歧义等临床语言的问题，本文提出了Ran Score。这是一种基于大语言模型的评估指标，通过模拟临床医生的逻辑，提升了对低流行率病变的关注度。该方法为放射学报告生成领域提供了一个更精准、更符合临床实际的自动化评价标准。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-ray report generation and automated evaluation are limited by poorrecognition of low-prevalence abnormalities and inadequate handling of clinicallyimportant language, including negation and ambiguity. We develop a clinician …

papers.title_en: Robust Safety Monitoring of Language Models via Activation Watermarking
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型可能被滥用于生成有害信息（如武器制造或恶意软件）的安全风险，本文提出了一种名为“激活水印”的鲁棒安全监控方法。该方法通过在模型推理过程中的激活层嵌入水印，旨在更有效地检测和标记不安全行为。研究证明了该技术在提升模型安全性方面的潜力，为防止模型滥用提供了一种新的防御机制。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) can be misused to reveal sensitive information, suchas weapon-making instructions or writing malware. LLM providers rely on $\emph{monitoring} $ to detect and flag unsafe behavior during inference. An open security …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 针对现有大视觉语言模型（LVLM）通过减少视觉标记来提高效率却导致信息瓶颈的问题，本文提出了VISOR框架。该方法采用稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互机制，在推理过程中根据需求提取关键视觉特征。这种方法在显著提升计算效率的同时，避免了传统标记减少带来的性能损失，为构建高效且强大的多模态模型提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: MedObvious: Exposing the Medical Moravec's Paradox in VLMs via Clinical Triage
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了视觉语言模型（VLM）在医学领域的“莫拉维克悖论”，即模型虽能生成流利的诊断文本，但在基础的临床分诊视觉理解上存在缺陷。通过引入MedObvious基准测试，研究揭示了模型在处理看似简单的医学图像分类和分诊任务时的局限性，强调了视觉理解安全性在医疗AI中的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used for tasks like medical reportgeneration and visual question answering. However, fluent diagnostic text does notguarantee safe visual understanding. In clinical practice, interpretation begins with …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对语言模型中语言表示学习难以追踪的长期难题，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪方法。该方法旨在解决在深度神经语言模型中定位和理解特定语言表示的困境，通过引入扰动机制，为探究模型内部表示的形成与分布提供了一种新的理论与实践工具，显著提升了表示追踪的效率。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Estimating near-verbatim extraction risk in language models with decoding-constrained beam search
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型中标准贪婪解码方法在衡量记忆风险时的局限性，提出了一种基于解码约束束搜索的新方法。该方法能够更准确地估算模型近乎逐字提取训练数据的概率，揭示了提取风险在不同序列间的变化。这一贡献为量化模型记忆和评估隐私泄露风险提供了更精细的工具，有助于深入理解LLM的数据安全问题。
papers.abstract_en: Recent work shows that standard greedy-decoding extraction methods forquantifying memorization in LLMs miss how extraction risk varies across sequences.Probabilistic extraction--computing the probability of generating a target suffix given …
